title: Book sleep apnea check
description: Schedule a doctor consultation or sleep study discussion.

title: Set alarm across room
description: Make the 06:30 wake-up require standing up within 30 seconds.

title: Order walking pad
description: Choose a model with at least 130 kg support, ideally 140-150 kg.

title: Install pull-up bar
description: Set up a safe pull-up bar and test dead hangs.

title: Remove sweets from office
description: Clear chocolates and sweets from the office and bedroom.

title: Write AI-use work rule
description: Before Claude or Codex, write problem, done state, constraints, and verification.

title: Create NGO outreach list
description: Collect the first 50 NGO leads for website or SEO outreach.

title: Send first 10 NGO messages
description: Send concise audit/outreach messages to 10 NGOs.

title: Define proposal fund envelope
description: Create a 5000 USD proposal target and monthly saving line.

title: Define car payoff tracker
description: Create a 10500 EUR car payoff target and note no early penalty.

title: Plan two reliable meals
description: Choose two repeatable meals with protein that reduce sweets risk.

title: Complete first weekly review
description: Review wake-ups, porn, sweets, walking, work shipped, and outreach.

title: Create week 2 task list
description: Turn the next seven days into concrete daily tasks.

title: Prepare OpenClue adjustment notes
description: Record what the bot got wrong and what needs to be added next.
